title: The Trailhead
tagline: A small trailhead sticker that quietly checks today's sky and sunset for you.
holy_shit: A patch of vinyl on a post can quietly tell you what it's like up there right now — and exactly when to head back.
powered_by: /track extract cell + Open-Meteo + qr.mjs, hash-verified and rendered in the scanner's browser
agent_scenario: When you need one calm, place-specific safety readout from live data, delivered from a physical marker with no backend.
author: kody-w + Copilot
